phase: single (computed once at Stage 1; never revised)
aggregator: mean − 0.25 × (100 − min) within each role-block, applied across all CHECK_POINT-role points (Q-CP-3 LOCKED)
global_gate_condition: (every CHECK_POINT-role point has cp_fix_type_score == 0) OR (every CHECK_POINT-role point has cp_position_sigma_score == 0)
null_handling: check_point_score = null when no points designated with device_role=CHECK_POINT. Pre-processing subsystem determines survey-design adequacy (point count, spatial distribution, role allocation). Check_point measures only signal quality and documentation on the points provided.
